Function Documentation

field_iterator_t field_itr ( class_t *  cl,
bool  stat 
)

Returns an iterator for navigating the instance or static fields of a class depending on the value of stat

Parameters:
cl A pointer to a class
stat true if a static field iterator is needed, false otherwise
Returns:
An initialized iterator

static field_t* field_itr_find_next ( field_t *  curr,
field_t *  end,
bool  stat 
) [static]

Find the next field to iterate on unless there are no more available

Parameters:
curr The current field
end A pointer past the last field
stat true if a static field is wanted, false otherwise returns A pointer to the next field or NULL if no more are available
